message:
fix: handle compaction LLM call failure gracefully

If the compaction summarization LLM call throws (network error, rate
limit, etc.), the error previously propagated up and killed the entire
agent run. Compaction is best-effort, so now we catch the error, emit a
warning event, and continue the agent loop normally.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
